name: Hwy 23 Upper Access (near fish hatchery / Witter)
facilities: Uppermost AR-23 bridge crossing of War Eagle Creek, ~1 mi W of Witter (ZIP 72776), SE Madison Co; near War Eagle Fish Distributors/Minnow Farm (the 'fish hatchery', 23812 Hwy 23). Head of the ~38-mi Hwy 23-to-War Eagle Mill run per American Whitewater. Informal put-in; a locked gate has been reported. Bridge/channel point is precise (OSM); the minnow-farm landmark itself is not separately geocodable. NOTE alternate: a second AR-23xcreek crossing exists at 36.04215,-93.70427 (~4 mi S of Huntsville) if 'fish hatchery' was meant further north.

name: Hwy 412 Bridge Access
facilities: US-412 bridge E of Huntsville; documented upper put-in (~5 creek mi to Withrow Springs/Hwy 23 per Float Eureka). Schraeder Bend Class I ~1.8 mi downstream. Single US-412 x War Eagle Creek crossing.

name: Withrow Springs State Park Boating Access (Hwy 23 Bridge)
facilities: Traditional float base at the Hwy 23 bridge ~4 mi N of Huntsville. STATUS: SP river access & parking CLOSED for the Hwy 23 bridge replacement (announced 2024); new boat ramp/lot planned post-construction. Park shuttle 479-559-2593. Coord from AGFC 'Public Use Facilities' (designated boating access); OSM AR-23 bridge x channel = 36.15014,-93.73977 (~70 m).

name: Hwy 45 Bridge (Hindsville) Access
facilities: AR-45 bridge at Hindsville (ZIP 72738); common take-out for the Hwy 23-to-Hwy 45 float (~13.5 mi) and put-in for lower sections. USGS gauge 07049000 'War Eagle Creek near Hindsville' sits at 36.2000,-93.8550 (~250 m from bridge).

name: War Eagle Mill / War Eagle Bridge
facilities: Historic 1907 one-lane steel-truss War Eagle Bridge (NRHP) on Benton County Rd 98 at War Eagle Mill; just above Beaver Lake backwater. Common take-out. Double-corroborated: USGS gauge 07049050 'War Eagle Creek at War Eagle' = 36.26757,-93.94325 and Wikipedia/NRHP = 36.26750,-93.94333 (~10 m).

name: Gar Hole Road Low-Water Crossing ('the Slab')
facilities: Low-water slab crossing where Gar Hole Rd (runs off AR-12 near Lookout) meets War Eagle Creek, between the Hwy 45 bridge and War Eagle Mill (~4.6 creek mi above the mill); used to split the lower float. Channel point projected from the OSM Gar Hole Rd terminus (36.23554,-93.90432, ~73 m to mapped channel).

name: War Eagle Creek Walk-in Access ('Chicken House Access')
facilities: AGFC walk-in access on War Eagle Creek between Withrow Springs (Hwy 23) and the Hwy 45 bridge; locally called the 'Chicken House Access'. From AGFC 'Public Use Facilities' layer (AGFC-owned).
